review_rules: scene category must match the target category
selected product, script, manifest purpose, and scene source must agree
real_usage_storyboard requires perceptually distinct problem, usage, and result scenes
product_reference_repeat may reuse one to three exact identity-locked sources
controlled negatives are research-only and cannot be promoted as product candidates

vehicle-v046-story-pass.basis: six visually reviewed vehicle problem-product-use-result scenes

vehicle-v047-binding-block.basis: category-correct pixels but owner decision records selected-product script and manifest-purpose contamination

vehicle-controlled-repeat-story-block.basis: controlled single-source repetition does not satisfy storyboard diversity

cable-v046-story-pass.basis: six visually reviewed cable problem-product-use-result scenes

cable-v047-binding-block.basis: category-correct pixels but owner decision records selected-product script and manifest-purpose contamination

food-controlled-repeat-story-block.basis: approved repeat-format sources intentionally declared as storyboard for a format-negative control

food-v116-repeat-pass.basis: explicit owner-review waiver and completed V116 evidence for two identity-locked food sources

food-controlled-wrong-category-repeat-bl.basis: controlled vehicle sources cannot satisfy a food product-reference package

cable-controlled-nonidentity-repeat-bloc.basis: six context images are not an identity-locked one-to-three-source repeat package
